title: HOMESHOPA Microwave Plate Cover, 30cm 1 Pack Microwave Splatter Guard Lid with Steam Vents, Plastic Transparent Ventilated Food Plate Dish Cover Kitchen Cooking, BPA Free & Dishwasher Safe
features: MICROWAVE SPLATTER GUARD: Save yourself from mess and minimise your cleaning time with this microwave food cover. Whether you're cooking, warming, defrosting, or reheating food, this plastic microwave plate cover will evenly warm it up while protecting the interior walls and door of your microwave from food splatter/splashes, which can become difficult to remove over time.

HEALTHY MATERIALS: The microwave splatter guard cover is made of BPA-free, environmentally friendly, and healthy food-grade plastic that is also easy to clean. The microwave cover for food is microwave-safe, dishwasher-safe, and food-safe.

CONVENIENCE HUMANIZED DESIGN: The microwave lid cover design with adjustable steam vents allows moisture to escape easily, keeps food moist while splatters and mess are contained, and helps to cook your food more evenly. The microwave oven cover can also be used as a fruit basket to hold fruits and vegetables.

EASY GRIP HANDLE: The microwave-safe plastic splatter guard is ergonomically designed with an easy grip handle to fit the characteristics of human hands and stay cool to the touch, allowing you to lift the lid off food without burning your fingers. The entire family can use it.

EASY TO CLEAN AND REUSABLE: The round splash protectore cover has a simple construction and can be easily cleaned with water and a sponge to remove splatter and oil stains. The microwave food plate dish cover is dishwasher safe. When clean and dry, it can be returned to your microwave to assist you in preparing your next meal and can last for a long time.

CONVENIENT TIME SAVING: The anti-splatter design will save you hours of cleaning each week as this high quality microwave food cover protects the walls of your microwave oven from food splatter while heating your favourite meal or snack. Less time spent cleaning up means more time to enjoy your meal.
description: Keep Your Microwave Clean Tired of cleaning the spaghetti sauce that has gotten all over the walls of your microwave? This Homeshopa Microwave Food Plate Cover is a simple and effective way to save time and hassle when reheating foods in your microwave. This innovative solution is simple and convenient; simply place this cover over the dinner plate and close the microwave door to reheat your food without worrying about splashes or cheese outbursts. Microwave splatter gaurd cover is a must-have kitchen tool for cooking, reheating small portions of food, picnicking, and other cooking activities. Prevent splattering from the microwave while cooking. An essential tool for preparing microwave meals. Along with being a microwave food plate cover dish, you can also be used to preserve and protect food indoors or outdoors during the summer from the elements, particularly flies, bugs, dirt, and dust. Cover a variety of food platters such as snacks, nibbles, appetisers, and sweet treats such as cupcakes and biscuits. This microwave splatter guard is made of food safe plastic, is BPA Free, and is dishwasher safe on the top rack. Innovative steam vents allow moisture to escape while encouraging airflow to prevent condensation buildup. The grip handle on the microwave food plate cover is designed to fit the characteristics of human hands. Ideal for most microwaves and compatible with any bowl, plate, or dish that fits into your microwave oven. Microwave plastic plate cover aids in the quick and even reheating of foods. Its anti-splash design protects the interior of your microwave while cooking or reheating, keeping it clean. It is simple to clean and saves you time and energy.
